text: The first space feels tranquil and almost expectant, arranged for waiting or contemplation. The beanbags suggest informal gathering or rest, and the empty expanse heightens my sense of introspection. The second area hums with possibility—a vibrant, energetic wall dedicated to research and development. Here, I feel intellectually stimulated, the colors and text awakening my curiosity and desire to contribute to progress. I sense a transition in myself from quiet observation to dynamic engagement.
